contentBlocks.original:
यानि कानि च पापानि जन्मान्तरकृतानि च
तानि सर्वाणि नश्यन्ति प्रदक्षिणः पदे पदे
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yāni kāni ca pāpāni janmāntarakṛtāni ca
tāni sarvāṇi naśyanti pradakṣiṇaḥ pade pade
contentBlocks.translation: By circumambulating (pradakṣiṇa) each step, any and all sins, even those carried over from past births, are destroyed.
contentBlocks.meanings: यानि (yāni) – whatever; कानि (kāni) – any; च (ca) – and; पापानि (pāpāni) – sins; जन्मान्तरकृतानि (janmāntarakṛtāni) – done in past births (janma:birth | antara:other | kṛtāni:done); च (ca) – and; तानि (tāni) – those; सर्वाणि (sarvāṇi) – all; नश्यन्ति (naśyanti) – are destroyed; प्रदक्षिणः (pradakṣiṇaḥ) – circumambulating; पदे (pade) – at each step; पदे (pade) – at each step;
